case.title: CONTINENTAL CAS. CO. v. U.S. FOR USE OF AINSWORTH

opinion.h1: CONTINENTAL CAS. CO. v. U.S. FOR USE OF AINSWORTH, 292 U.S. 641 (1934)
opinion.h2: CONTINENTAL CASUALTY COMPANY, petitioner, v. The UNITED STATES of america, for the use of W. Howard AINSWORTH, Trustee, etc.* No. 941.
Supreme Court of the United States
opinion.p: Mr. William P. Smith, of Chicago, Ill., for petitioner.
Petition for writ of certiorari to the United States Circuit Court of Appeals for the Seventh Circuit denied.
* Rehearing denied 292 U.S. 615, 54 S. Ct. 862, 78 L. Ed. --.[ Continental Cas. Co. v. U.S. for Use of Ainsworth 292 U.S. 641 (1934) ]
